[{"Name":"Leslie Aurora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4egeGfZ4GverFKbpS46rCN0uZizimQEZLfqM5SCSE6iv_YA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend Andrew highly enough. From start to finish, my experience with him was nothing short of exceptional. He is incredibly honest, professional, and genuinely passionate about his craft.
What stood out most was his dedication to quality. He took the time to explain every step of the process, showing both the quick way and the proper way to handle each task. He chose to do the job the right way, ensuring a roof that is not only secure today but will reliably last for many years to come. His attention to detail and commitment to thorough workmanship was evident throughout the project.
Beyond his technical expertise, he showed remarkable professionalism and kindness. He went above and beyond to address potential issues, including taking care with potential wildlife in the roof. Even more impressive, he encouraged us to explore other options and find a solution that fit our budget, demonstrating a level of integrity that is rare in the contracting world.
As someone familiar with the industry, I can honestly say that finding a contractor who combines honesty, diligence, passion, and selflessness is incredibly rare. Working with Andrew was a true pleasure, and anyone looking for quality, trustworthy service would be blessed to hire him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cole Warner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuP4KqAaQAyuzHnEmqehsdh0bl1sPBzSfW9MpLq61awX2bAYcxcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent craftsmanship! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Russ Hamilton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSSCtRpxV47ZfwvkU_kALse4ZGz2Q7PT_uBPKaIJZaluzYMw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience with Dougs Roofing and construction. I reached out to Doug in a panic when my roof was leaking. He came onsite right away and set me up with an emergency repair and let me know what I needed to fix the job long term.  It turned out I needed a new roof.

I just had my roof installed today and am thrilled with it. Doug and his crew were amazing. Professional and performed top notch work and cleaned up the entire time, leaving no mess or frustrated neighbours along the way. Plus  The finished product is fantastic and all backed by an amazing warranty and very great guy in Doug.  I couldn't have asked for more. Spot on.

Great job Doug and crew. I will be using you for many future projects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lise Zack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJreToG-ER7Za5b9-gPF_4POzsC19k5ibd_948B8N5TC_QhLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Doug's Roofing and Construction is a great company! Doug, himself, takes pride in all he does and it shows. We hired him to take apart my daughter's loft right down to the beams and redo everything including walls, floors, insulation and paint. His work was exceptional to the point where he even added an extra window which my daughter absolutely loved.
As he was doing this job, he called me in the room and pointed out the mold/mildew on the insulation and that we can see the sky through her ceiling. I couldn't believe it!! He then took the time to explain what had happened and what he can do to repair it. He shared different options and how much this would entail. Everything was repaired, new insulation where needed, new roof that was definitely needed and the renovation was done, cost efficiently and very timely!
I would highly recommend Doug's Roofing and Construction for any renovations you need done and also if you require a new roof! You won't regret it!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dustin Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCn-nUUl0W_vaJ0rI3vjIAwzy0c7Xdto0JB58X5KVE_tI2gVBi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Doug came over and shingled my shed. Now renovating our fifth home it is a great relief to have someone quoting work with a very honest and reasonable price for the times we are in. We’re tired of taking time out to listen to sales only to be hit with an exurbanite price with the same old story that things just cost more now. There’s reality and than there’s just greed. It’s nice to find someone that’s quoting reality and not greed. We highly recommend not wasting your time and making 4ward Exteriors your first and perhaps only quote.
Excellent price, excellent work and after mentioning 4wards Exteriors to neighbours we find they have been busy bettering several homes in the neighbourhood for years now.
Thank you again 4wards Exteriors. We will definitely use your expertise again and highly recommend others do the same.
Very Grateful
Dan and Anne Brennan","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim Clifford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxb-GgQcKDskm9aNC4hLukXOVOdFsquOUavj0f-jHMTLvo2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"James is very knowledgeable, did an excellent job explaining everything and used quality materials. Not only professional yet friendly, Derek went up in both attic spaces and showed me pictures  of a concerning issue, while other companies  just walked around the roof. He was thorough, informative and patiently explained things without being pushy. Ryan came in throughout  to check on progress and completion, putting me at ease. Pricing was explained and more than fair as many sheets of plywood needed replacing. Communication is key with this company.  When they say they will be there, they are. Weather permitting,  they show up, from daily work, bin removal, flashing completion, to final check up when complete.
I can't  say enough about Kevin and his crew. Kevin was amazing, going above and beyond. His knowledge, skill and great work ethic saw the big job done beautifully and I  am thrilled. The crew efficiently cleaned up as they worked, as well as the end of each day
I can now relax and not worry the next time a wind storm  blows through !
Thank you to the Team at Roofmaster!             I highly recommend  you to everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD21Gz1AiZ5ZhFZUSA3ex3X&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"spruce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmFl_YZw9kw4_vjjP5jFXJoXY11R1miSEJd2dzOFeSjocuDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reply: The debris has already been cleaned up, but your offer is appreciated. Just wanted to make people aware to avoid this in the future.

This is about the company's negligence towards others' safety, respect for others' property, and work clean up. A neighbour hired this company to do their roof. As these pictures show, on my property, we found;
- random loose nails,
- roofing tile pieces,
- a roofing tile with 2 nails sticking up,
- a row of 10 brad nails that we almost wouldn't have found, or could've stepped on if they didn't shine in the light
- a piece of clear plastic wrap
- it appears that a worker stuffed Timberline packaging under my fence where there's a small opening

A large part of this disregard for others' safety and property was when a worker from this company was up on the neighbour's roof, blowing the garbage/debris away with a leaf blower, which fell onto my property.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM1-eNftP_nWDbgLaFWUcW&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Neal Cockshutt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU_7fNQrxU7r41yv8KHwSusWfJeI9fuVL6ziqu7ur8TZy-Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible to deal with. Work done in -6c weather and appreciate that it got fixed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chrystal Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsJ8NEvZgLWdeVhHA3NwbKftMxSt_XVMylSONHApmiHQK5XWJO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It's a long and boring story about poor communication and unprofessionalism, I'll try to be concise.  After disappearing for months past the planned install time period, and being told by an employee that I'd lost my deposit because the company was in shambles with covid, I got a call that the installers were at my house to do the install, no warning, no appointment scheduled.  $10k worth of windows and doors.  Life had changed with covid, I was under the impression that I'd be finding a new source for windows, and I was isolating in another city.

I made the mistake of allowing the installation to proceed with a tenant supervising.  I own that mistake.  Two doors were poorly installed. Multiple attempts (more than 5) were made by Precision to remedy the problems with one door, including involving the manufacturer (Del Windows & Doors), who confirmed it was an install issue. The first installer told the tenant that the door was ordered the wrong size, but Precision has stated that wasn't the case. It's never been clear to me why the door was so difficult to install correctly, I stopped asking for remedies and told the owner not to bother coming back again because I'd lost confidence in their ability to fix the door. The problem with the second door was never addressed. Some of the windows have condensation which makes me worry that the seals are broken.

I reported to the company owner that I was not happy, and that I was trying to decide what to do, that I had to pay for a tire puncture on my truck because of the nails and screws left around the property, that the 2 doors were still an issue.  One door has to be 'hip checked' closed, the other door has a threshold hanging out more than an inch causing a trip hazard, and the door isn't square in the frame.  I haven't been able to be home long enough to properly deal with the situation, covid has turned everyone's world upside down.  I did commit to the owner that I would pay the bill, and had been sending instalments. But I wasn't feeling comfortable or happy paying the whole bill because of the problems.  I did want to bring in another contractor to fix the problem and ask Precision to cover their bill, but, as I said, my hands are full elsewhere.  Tonight, the owner was belligerent, name calling, threatening etc. And again, I made clear to him my dissatisfaction, without calling anyone names or insulting.

I have never received an apology for the hassles, for the mess the installers left or for my tire puncture.  The remainder of my bill was paid tonight, but I'm not happy about paying for poor workmanship, I just don't have any capacity or interest in fighting. I wasn't going to leave a review as my part of the ownership of the problem, but after the owner's unprofessional belligerence tonight, and threats of a lawsuit if I left a review, I feel it's fair to share my experience. Pictures are of the door which was 'fixed' multiple times.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICij7rY8QE&fid=0x0:0x44747ee5537e0d1"],"When":"2020-11-18"},{"Name":"Misha Bourget","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMkqthRAIUmI0VWp8YGDCdYBj6sIHFmoB7TvXdGgyzpWFE3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can not say enough good things about Precision. They did our roof and siding. From booking appointments (Joanne is a pleasure to deal with) to installation - I had a fantastic experience! They made sure we were happy multiple times throughout the process. My house looks great. I wish I had more projects to hire them for just so I could deal with them again! Thank you so much 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tina Bolgar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR8GwtcCoATkvhBqOJhSewdAcSMWunYtVbud8QYDufgDCbUh6uUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had all of our doors and windows replaced by Precision Roofing.  They did a very professional installation with close attention to detail.  Their pricing was more competitive then anyone else that had provided a quote to us.
Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDGru_FMw&fid=0x0:0x44747ee5537e0d1"],"When":"2021-11-28"},{"Name":"Jeremy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpkMhVZeJSIVuxWux8DzJpqYnArWVm5MkixR0u-1eTeRUAiw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an incredible company, I could go on and on about the quality of product and workmanship, the fair pricing, the wonderful approach to customer service by everyone we interacted with through the process but the most amazing part of the whole experience came yesterday, 8 years after our initial install, during a heavy rainstorm, we noticed a small leak threatening our newly renovated washroom, we called precision for help and they went out of their way to have someone out the same day to fix the issue. We've recommended them to everyone who mentions the word roof in our presence and we'll continue to do so as long as this incredible team is around. Such a rare experience, thank you precision, don't ever change","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jared R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlm1mwH4iHBmvAAgGuSsD1Ve1fiWZOa8xpPpuYJD1Jdt_qYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top notch from start to finish.  Jerry and crew did a great job with the install, and Joanne in the office is a pleasure to deal with.  Fair pricing, quality work, can’t ask for much more.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"PAUL MARCOV","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfcqDPFQIj5aUE0Bu5MxJphYke9lEBs8j62_Qs_fU497gQcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful Quality Roof & Exterior complete on my cottage in Haldimand thanks to Precision Roofing & Quality Exteriors. open_hours: {"Friday":["7 a.m.–7 p.m."],"Monday":["7 a.m.–7 p.m."],"Saturday":["7 a.m.–4 p.m."],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["7 a.m.–7 p.m."],"Tuesday":["7 a.m.–7 p.m."],"Wednesday":["7 a.m.–7 p.m."]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"David Ruler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIP12fyS137ro05JmCc2y2VgjBHAmIfwFTaOGIdfecp8Lb1kHE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pro.Found roofing quickly determined the root cause of a leaking roof installed new in 2016 that the original builder inspected multiple times and stated that there was no problem other than climate change.

Pro.Found was timely in their scheduling, used quality materials, installed correct products to mitigate further issues, inspected and performed preventative work to the original builder’s roof.

Pro.Found went above and beyond their original scope of work. The owner returned to personally repair the original vents with screws and caulking. He also installed a water diverter at the base of one of the eavestroughs to reduce the high water flow rate which led to extensive ice build up during winter months.

Pro.Found’s quote was highly competitive even after the additional work. It was less than we had budgeted.

In summary, Pro.Found Roofing is professional with meticulous attention to detail using quality products at a competitive price installed in a timely manner. They left our property clean and devoid of any roofing waste.

We highly recommend their work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7leuQ-gE&fid=0x0:0xa3d440a52c3713b9"],"When":"2024-8-26"},{"Name":"Farouk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdEF15mNSoZIcEQ0Y1dD532M0SzRl0O2NpwK8jNaEHe5FEktpOGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In a trade where honest and good roofers are hard to come by, look no further that Jon from Pro Found Roofing. He is professional, easy to get in touch with, and has your best interest at heart. His prices are the best you'll find because he's not trying to scam you. I pride myself on having good contacts from every trade that can get the job done right the first time and for anything that has to do with a roof, it's Jon.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikey Bobby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCuifE21S1nptMs9p31sqWe0Isq6n9yVFr7FOeBeJrAQVNmjxE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jon and his crew were awesome.  The weather worked against them but they still managed to get the job done in a timely manner. Price was also right and uses a better product. Even took time out of his day to come meet with us again as I'm an over the road trucker and I wanted to go over the quote with him. Very friendly. Highly recommend. also installed 2 skylights my wife wanted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDi4YbtzAE&fid=0x0:0xa3d440a52c3713b9"],"When":"2020-12-5"},{"Name":"Kristen Chaffe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTkFQbzc-v79ut-jsVJCbuji7FFgcZbRfOFqlyn9o8Cqf56vnL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Pro.Found Roofing. Jon and his crew did an amazing job! The quote was very competitive and the shingle brand he uses is extremely good quality compared to what other roofing companies use. The company isn't the only thing that's important in a big investment but also the brand of shingles they use. Jon has done his research and with experience knows what's truly the best product to use. I am extremely pleased by the workmanship they did. Everyone was personable, friendly and knowledgeable. Also so happy with the beautiful skylights they installed. Very professional! Thank you so much Jon!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sue snider","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiKlKkkD9Qkf8GU9QbIw9Ygjy38oCC5ipt09XNy4pVgIF99A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were so pleased with John and crew ! They did a small flat roof for us . John addressed all of our concerns quickly ! Will definitely recommend his company  to anyone looking for a roofing contractor!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bryan Black","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIekLAOsxBwl4JISeabPPH_ODTNAItQzmjyu6ac07zxsS-UPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was difficult to find a reasonably priced contractor to install a new flat roof over our garage.  John from Pro.Found roofing gave us a very reasonable estimate for the job.  His workman were very good.  This particular crew only does flat torched-on tar roofs.  They finished the 1100 square foot job in 2 days and did a good cleanup too. I am extremely pleased with the work finding it easy to award them a 5-star rating.  Thanks for the great job!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bill Butosi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxaQVlkLhe3u9n1qNSGG0hir6YvAGtmz_L-XIngeGfAlGABw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jon and his crew did a great job on my roof. They were very professional and conducted their business well. Jon answered all my questions and was very honest. They went out of their way to fix a few unrelated repairs on the roof as well without charge. The yard was cleaned up thoroughly. You would not have known they were there. The price was more than fair. I would highly recommend Pro.Found Roofing to my friends and family or anyone else looking for a roofer. Thanks again, Jon. Great work, guys.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raj Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUOmsupv4lBG90_9DTU-0qvFQNNFDmcCAucK8w0REzG8FYbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"John at Pro.Found Roofing did an exceptional job on our roof for a great value. Our project involved a large peaked roof, as well a small section of flat roof and the replacement of two skylights. John and his team were extremely polite and professional. Ps. The project did take longer than anticipated, as they tend to underestimate how much they can get done in a day. Also you will need to remind them to leave things neat and tidy at the end of the day like materials and be on top of them to run the magnet machine to pick up any nails that have went a stray.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They gave me a discounted delivery and we're so helpful. Definitely will be using them in the spring when I replace my other windows","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQmuePpIuL0UDWnERlkexa\u0026fid=0x0:0x48a9222574578f44"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Natasha Brunette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk5ugjQqrGRhDECfUVRzOYAlJ9sLO-OQW8XvhnLGTc9SG3UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible experience. Paid cash for our purchase because they have a 3% surcharge if paying by credit. Was not told only 30 days to make a return and when making a return that you would not get cash or credit back to your debit card immediately, but rather would have to wait for the following day to be issued a cheque. If they did without cheques they wouldn't have to charge customers 3% surcharge to pay. Also charged us over $50.00 restocking fee when the invoice was less than $300.00. Not easily accessible either, as no automatic door available. Picture a women walking in with two large boxes and having to pull the door open as no automatic door button available only to be told returns are done next door, (no signage) and then get told by the employee that they are busy right now but set the stuff down and they will be with me when they can. Then notes the items of return on a paper and doesn't want to given me a copy..Also closed all last week for vacation drove to Welland twice to make this return and was charged over $50.00 restocking fee and wanted to make me return the following day to pick up a cheque for the return or they could mail it. Went here to stay away from Big Box store and ended up being way more inconvenient and more expensive. I will NEVER go back to Dunrite.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bill Fancy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3DFDomQkgm7FSFyinfUVgQVVucW3a8J2q0DeOcaS682u5sKGS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"When considering the wide selection of top-quality products, it's essential to be mindful of the 3 percent upcharge for credit card transactions. Recognizing this fee upfront can empower you to make more informed purchasing decisions and maximize the value of your investment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benjamin Redpath","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0lF8Jd-rYg7xjr37F5iIFLCgYN7Yz9NAfhTTLCzlMH-7mrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolute garbage company. First time ordering from them back  in March they charged me a double delivery fee for being 30 minute drive from warehouse. Wouldn’t have minded other than the delivery was missing majority of the hardware and when I called to inquire they basically blamed it on me without any care in the world. Secondly today I placed an order for nearly $5000 where they wanted to charge $70 to deliver less than 5 minutes from the shop. Reason why was because I didn’t  specifically  order over 100 feet of trough, guy behind the counter was an absolute miserable human being who couldn’t even be bothered to ask his superior whether he could waive the delivery fee considering the $5000 order. Needless to say I canceled the order and will find a company who seems at least half appreciative of their customers. Wish I could give them a zero.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pat Taylor-van natter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2_HSi9pgEFXHY4a3baU2oXah33hXk_5mlNJYLptHHhHcbKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good selection of vinyl siding and colour choices with knowledable staff and fair prices. Regardless if the job is small or big, they ensure the customer is happy with the results.  From their employees to the owners of the Bosco Roofing, their goal is ensure the customer is their priority and they complete this goal by the hard work and excellent roofing installation they do.  Keep up the good work Rico!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bill Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGKvRzVVAhT1kWe129EjxJw57wNo_h46mk00FwEMad56iT-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Bosco Roofing to replace our roof and would highly recommend them. We are very happy with the new roof and the service by Bosco Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doug Lawrence","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-VPl313ZHs7lmO6kqF4Qyh7Up9Wy54dHejSjapX46sYxCpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hired Bosco Roofing to replace my roof. The fact that they have been in business for over 50 years helped my decision for warranty work if it was ever needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dino Sabic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKu_insPCI4Co3xRsX0hutVNamiSnE16F7HfPHL8nRKtP5IUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wouldn't go anywhere else for my roofing needs. Bosco did a fantastic job on our roof, and our neighbors. The crew were very professional, and respectful individuals. The job was well done and done quickly. Overall a very pleasant experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Guerriero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm1Ng0tHQmH1a1KGv8cxGhmP33AC2Wqjlc-pl2ol9DzTOPwnr-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Bosco Roofing to come and look my roof.  I was fortunate enough to work with both Robert and Ricco.  Robert came to my home to assess the problems we were having and gave me a quote and since my husband works days, I had to deal with this situation.  I felt comfortable allowing Robert into my home while I was home alone with my 3 small children.  Robert was respectful, reliable and trustworthy and I have to say on a personal note, he was so kind and loving to my children.\nI wanted Robert to give me a quote of replacing my entire roof and when he inspected the roof to assess the problem he told me that we didn't need a new roof that he would repair the problem and that my roof should still last me quite a few years. Robert could have told me that the whole roof needed to be replaced even though it didn't,  he was honest enough not to take advantage of me.  Bosco Roofing completed my roof in a timely and efficient manner, his crew came in early and fixed our roof.  During the repair, I got to speak with Ricco who was their supervising and when we were speaking I mentioned that I heard a vibration near my daughters room, he immediately got on the ladder and went to look to see if he could see something.  This was above and beyond, something he really didn't have to do and as it happened he saw something that he thought was the issue and he fixed it no questions asked.\nThe Bosco crew fixed our roof, cleaned everything up and you wouldn't have even known that we had a crew on our property.  We have recommended this company to our family and friends and will continue to do so.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lori K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB_UVc-ms7sahBIAwLsgQoaP2eIeaPk6k_BD4P69Y3onHXM7yO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rob at Bosco Roofing was great to work with!  Great communication and price. The roof looks beautiful. Completed quickly and professionally. I tell all my friends that need roofing done that I highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Beifuss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3-KK6nm1eiC3734Wa0hcD_wzKKzd6SLXBmLvbhdG1S4syIqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Courteous, professional, respectful and responsive all wrapped into a family operated business applying a superior product with a strong warranty, at competitive prices.  Not sure what else I could ask for, in a roofing company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICUtqDcMw\u0026fid=0x0:0x798cab393c2a3732"],"When":"2019-7-16"}]

We hired JP again in 2022 and 2025 to replace the roof on 2 of our rental properties and were again very happy with our experience with him and his crew. We would highly recommend JP Roofing and Construction.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELj7tuzstNX_Sg&fid=0x0:0x9b8af7c926549798"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Tim MacNeil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpDlesH0NMiMNOWo_ijezZg97f8DaUezj8R7WLH5DnhhlLjfemIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enthusiastically recommend JPG Construction for roofing to anyone that asks.

Pros: Competitive price savings, 1-day job, safe and tidy job site.

Cons: Scuffed siding here and there (minor),  satellite dish 'removal' (minor because addressed by owner)

In Feb 2018 I asked JPG Construction to estimate the cost of re-roofing my house.  Jean Phillip (JP) came over the same day,  on time, and made a great impression for JPG Construction. Jean Phillip is not impatient or aggressive.  He listens to questions and answers them thoughtfully. He made helpful suggestions. Of course, I agreed to his estimate. :)

April 10 2018  Jean Phillip was on site to greet me and to see the job started. The shingle delivery was right on time.  Jean Phillips' brother was lead man of the crew.  The crew came to work exactly on time and started the job with energy and enthusiasm.  My roof was covered with workers by 8:10. The crew was mindful of safety for themselves, my family and mindful of our pets.  The job was finished in 8 hours as JP said it would be. The yard was clean.  There are some minor scuffs in the siding, I think you cannot them see from the street.  A satellite dish was thrown out in error,  I only asked to have it removed.  Jean Phillip is taking care of that for me.

My experience was very positive and I will have more work for this company in the future.  Do yourself a favor and hire this company before they are too busy!

Thank you JPG for a great job!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEt7aCXA&fid=0x0:0x9b8af7c926549798"],"When":"2018-4-12"},{"Name":"Karl Regier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlUfc9zVrJ6v3UNzRLrh1MFCbxTB3Hkk5RlgmO80dPhawh6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JPG did and amazing job and were in and out in a day when my tenant was away, the tenants came back and said "The new roof looks great and the crew did a hell of a clean-up job. Thanks and see you on the next one","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Myriah Bates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMdLrA6wbEgv-6f1-SRaCHtRjQpBdHMmY6XUiOA0kUE944Wne2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I wish I could share a positive review but I haven’t even had a chance to work with JP since he has no showed on me on 3 separate occasions. .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Georgia Plummer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWayaioZECJ-v6L6OHIFNTFDLZrBcAND2MnnWZo-g5rIHx5-QI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Couldn't get a real quote, definitely didnt want the work.
